soundtweaks.gui.title: SoundTweaks
soundtweaks.presets.title: Presets
soundtweaks.presets.no_favorites: No favorites yet — go to Manage Presets to add some
soundtweaks.import.presets.title: Import / Export Presets
soundtweaks.import.sounds.title: Import / Export Sound Config
soundtweaks.import.blocks.title: Import / Export Block Config
soundtweaks.tooltip.view_toggle:
Simple View: grouped by sound event
Detail View: individual sound files
soundtweaks.tooltip.presets_sidebar:
Toggle the presets sidebar.
Presets let you save and quickly switch
between different volume configurations.
soundtweaks.tooltip.import_config:
Import sound volumes from another instance.
Select soundtweaks.json for sounds,
or soundtweaks_blocks.json for blocks.
Replaces current configuration.
soundtweaks.tooltip.import_presets: Import presets from a shared JSON file.
soundtweaks.tooltip.export_presets: Export all current presets to a JSON file.
soundtweaks.tooltip.open_folder:
Open the folder containing
SoundTweaks config and preset files.
soundtweaks.tooltip.mute_preset: Mute / restore all currently visible sounds in this preset.
soundtweaks.tooltip.import_from_config:
Copies all sounds/blocks with volume ≠ 100%
from the base config into this preset.
Useful to snapshot your current global settings.
